bib.citation: De Lagarde, Paul A., ed. Librorum Vetis Testamenti Canonicorum pars prior graece. Göttingen: 1883
Gibson, Margaret Dunlop. Catalogue of the Arabic Manuscripts in the Convent of S. Catharine on Mount Sinai. Cambridge University Press, 1894

Gwilliam, George H.,  Francis C. Burkitt, and John F. Stenning, eds. Biblical and Patristic Relics of the Palestinian Syriac Literature from MSS. in the Bodleian Library and in the Library of Saint Catherine on Mount Sinai. Anecdota Oxoniensia 1:9. Oxford, 1896
Marcos, N. Fernández and Jose Ramon Busto-Saiz. El texto antioqueno de la Biblia Griega. Vol. 2, 1-2 Reyes. Madrid, 1992

program.label: Sinai Palimpsests Project
program.description: Imaged and studied as part of the Sinai Palimpsests Project (2011–2016), a collaboration between St. Catherine’s Monastery of the Sinai, the Early Manuscripts Electronic Library, and UCLA Library, funded by the Arcadia Fund and the Ahmanson Foundation. The project used multispectral imaging and scholarly analysis to recover and document erased and obscured texts in palimpsest manuscripts from the monastery’s collection.

cataloguer.message: Description and identification of undertexts as part of SPP (2011-2016). Migrated to SMDL in 2025.
